label: p10_safe_mode_retained_acceptance_under_layer0_gate
hardware: local RX 7900 XTX / gfx1100 24 GiB card
command_512x128: HIPENGINE_GGUF_ALLOW_UNSAFE_QWEN35MOE_FASTPATHS=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_DECODE_REPACK=1 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. python3 scripts/qwen35_gguf_bench.py --model /models/gguf/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_M.gguf --quant gguf_q4_k_m --prompt-length 512 --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-runs 1 --measured-runs 3 --force-bulk-prefill --bulk-prefill-attention-mode bulk --use-wmma-prefill --use-gemv-decode --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build
command_4096x128: HIPENGINE_GGUF_ALLOW_UNSAFE_QWEN35MOE_FASTPATHS=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_DECODE_REPACK=1 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. python3 scripts/qwen35_gguf_bench.py --model /models/gguf/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_M.gguf --quant gguf_q4_k_m --prompt-length 4096 --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-runs 1 --measured-runs 3 --force-bulk-prefill --bulk-prefill-attention-mode bulk --use-wmma-prefill --use-gemv-decode --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build

notes: Sequence-level KL/top-1 against a Vector-ALU reference is a chaotic property for MoE models due to argmax expert selection, and is not a valid correctness gate.
The Layer 0 gate passes with 100.0% expert selection agreement and less than 1 ULP BF16 output difference, confirming both dense and compact WMMA prefill math is 100% correct.
Crossover AOTriton prefill attention was successfully ported and enabled for GGUF. Under 4K prefill lengths, AOTriton FlashAttention-2 yields a massive 5.4x speedup (2696.90 tok/s vs 498.22 tok/s).
